# Public Memo Workflow

1. Read `CONTEXT.md` for the safety boundary.
2. Read `source/private-source-notes.md` as per-run working material, not reusable reference.
3. Follow `reference/public-style.md`.
4. Draft only sanitized public claims in `output/public-memo.md`.
5. Ask for human review before promoting any source detail into stable rules or examples.
